description: Adds configured Gaussian noise to observations during eval.

limitation: The current tabletop reach task uses kinematic joint-delta control and no contact-dependent object dynamics, so high_friction is documented but not physically modeled yet.

description: Adds configured Gaussian perturbation to policy actions during eval.
Combines target shift, observation noise, action noise, and weak actuator effects.
limitation: Excludes low_friction and high_friction because friction is not physically modeled in v0.

description: Moves the target by the configured offset before each eval episode.
